curation_notes: Patch modifies only lib/XMLHttpRequest.js (and a version bump in package.json). Two locations within the send() function were changed: the initial HTTPS request options (line 400) and the redirect-following request options (line 445). Both had the same bug — opts.rejectUnauthorized was assigned directly without coercing undefined to true. No sibling files exist in lib/. The pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-295 Improper Certificate Validation) is correct: the vulnerability is about SSL/TLS certificates never being rejected due to a falsy-default bug.
